tagline: Buffalo's Premier Swimming Pool Service & Maintenance Provider

hero.headline:
Your Pool, Perfectly Maintained All Season
Every Season
hero.subheadline: Western New York winters are tough on pools. 716 Pool Service handles every detail — openings, closings, weekly care, and repairs — so you can skip the chemicals and enjoy every swim.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Season Pool Care<br class="hidden md:block"> From Opening to Closing
services.subtitle: Western New York pool season is short — make the most of it. We handle every aspect of your pool so you never waste a warm day on maintenance.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Water testing, chemical balancing, vacuuming, skimming, and brushing every week. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all summer long.

cards.title: Pool Opening
cards.description: Complete spring startup — cover removal, equipment dewinterizing, deck blowing, vacuuming, brushing, and shock treatment to get you swimming fast.

cards.title: Pool Closing & Winterization
cards.description: Full winterization including line blowing, equipment protection, and winter cover installation. Your pool stays safe through Buffalo's toughest months.

cards.title: Equipment Install & Repair
cards.description: Professional removal and installation of pumps, filters, and heaters. We diagnose issues fast and get your equipment running efficiently.

cards.title: Pool Inspection Services
cards.description: Buying a home with a pool? Our thorough inspections assess pool condition, equipment, and maintenance needs so you know exactly what you're getting.

cards.title: Spring Deep Cleaning
cards.description: Season-opening deep clean including deck pressure washing, thorough vacuuming, surface brushing, and chemical treatment to kick off summer right.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool Season

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll discuss your pool's needs and provide an honest, no-pressure quote — usually within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our experienced crew arrives on schedule and handles it all — cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks. You'll always know what was done.

steps.title: Just Dive In
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling clean and perfectly balanced from opening day to closing. If something's not right, we come back and fix it — no charge.

about.label: Why WNY Pool Owners Trust Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated, Community-Trusted Pool Care
about.description: Founded in Clarence in 2021, 716 Pool Service started with a simple promise: treat every pool like it's our own. Matt and the team have grown through word of mouth and a relentless commitment to doing things right. With a perfect 5-star rating across 64 reviews, our reputation speaks for itself. Every job gets the owner's personal attention — because your pool deserves nothing less.

features.title: Owner On Every Job
features.description: Matt personally oversees your service and visits to resolve any issues. You're never handed off to a stranger.

features.title: No Contracts. No Pressure.
features.description: We earn your trust every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees — just reliable service you can count on.

features.title: WNY Climate Experts
features.description: We understand what Buffalo winters do to pools. Our winterization and opening processes are built for Western New York's unique conditions.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. Tell us about yours and we'll provide an honest quote — no hidden fees, no upselling, no contracts.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. We've built our 5-star reputation one pool at a time, and we're not about to let a single customer down. Your satisfaction isn't just a promise — it's how we've earned every one of our 64 five-star reviews.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within the same week. During peak season (late May through June), we book up fast — so the earlier you call, the better. We'll always do our best to accommodate your timeline.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home when your crew arrives?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and go about their day. After every visit, we'll update you on what was done and the condition of your pool so you're always in the loop.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Western New York?
faqs.answer: We serve Clarence, Buffalo, Amherst, Williamsville, Lancaster, Orchard Park, Hamburg, East Aurora, and the greater WNY area. If you're unsure whether we cover your neighborhood, just give us a call.

faqs.question: Why should I hire a pro instead of maintaining my pool myself?
faqs.answer: Between chemical balancing, equipment monitoring, and weekly cleaning, proper pool care takes 4-6 hours per week. Our team handles it all so you get your weekends back — and your pool stays healthier with professional-grade care.

faqs.question: Do you offer one-time services or just weekly plans?
faqs.answer: Both! We offer one-time openings, closings, deep cleans, and inspections alongside our weekly maintenance plans. Whatever your pool needs, we have a service that fits.

testimonials.name: Jennifer J.
testimonials.text: Communication was excellent — they were responsive, professional, and easy to work with. The owner personally visited to resolve equipment issues. That kind of customer service is rare.

testimonials.name: John W.
testimonials.text: Matt and the team at 716 Pool Service are excellent. Their spring cleaning was efficient and done in no time — what would have taken me an entire weekend, they knocked out fast.

testimonials.name: Bernadette R.
testimonials.text: Very satisfied with 716 Pool Services. Matt and his crew are thorough, dependable, and professional. They maintain our pool consistently and I give them a strong recommendation.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments — just honest pool care from a team that treats your pool like their own.
benefits: Free pool assessment with every quote
